# `/me` Command
Displays a message about yourself.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Any</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>No</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/me <message: message>`

## Arguments
- `message`: message
